name: search
description: Search the web for external information not available in email, calendar, or chat

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Searches the web for external information. Use when the user asks about topics NOT available in their email, calendar, or chat — such as general knowledge, public information, documentation, or news. Do NOT use web_search when the answer can be found in the user's email (use list_emails or triage_email), calendar (use list_events), or team chat (use list_messages or search_messages). Do NOT fabricate search results — if you cannot find the information, say so clearly.

query.description: The search query. Be specific — use keywords that clearly describe what you're looking for.
